meta.slice: Stage A Thinking and AI Team Formation

user_prompt: Predict and review 2026 World Cup matches every day.

thinking.task_type: Prediction preparation, review, and learning from outcomes.
thinking.likely_project_type: 2026WC prediction and review project with recurring manual check-ins.
thinking.cadence_assumption: Requested review rhythm: daily BJT/SGT 20:30 from 2026-06-10 to 2026-07-20. Static prototype records the rhythm only and does not send reminders.
clarification_notes: Which odds sources should the user supply?
Which injury, rotation, and team-news inputs are trusted?
How should prediction quality be scored?
thinking.boundary: Fixture text only, manual review only, no automatic data fetching, no reminder sending, no prediction run.

original_mission_seed.summary: Analyze the full 2026 World Cup schedule, team strength, player condition, style, tactics, history, upset angles, and mainstream bookmaker odds. Predict only the next Beijing-time match day and review the previous day before each prediction.
original_mission_seed.format_context: 48 teams, 104 matches, 12 groups, group top two plus best third-place teams advance, then knockout path.
original_mission_seed.requested_review_rhythm: BJT/SGT 20:30 daily, 2026-06-10 to 2026-07-20, recorded as a review rhythm only.

ai_team_formation.responsibility: Compare actual results with prior predictions.
ai_team_formation.why_needed: Keeps the daily loop grounded in hit and miss records.
ai_team_formation.decided_by: TWOS from the requested daily review workflow

ai_team_formation.responsibility: Read user-supplied 1X2, handicap, totals, and score-odds notes.
ai_team_formation.why_needed: Separates market consensus from suspicious pricing.

ai_team_formation.responsibility: Summarize style, tactics, formation, pressing, transition, and set pieces.
ai_team_formation.why_needed: Connects team identity to match-level prediction logic.
ai_team_formation.decided_by: TWOS from the style and tactics requirement

ai_team_formation.responsibility: Evaluate player form, injuries, rotation, load, and key-player condition when supplied.
ai_team_formation.why_needed: Prevents team-level strength from ignoring current form.

ai_team_formation.role: 历史与大赛心理分析师
ai_team_formation.responsibility: Weigh history, tournament pressure, and big-match psychology.
ai_team_formation.why_needed: World Cup results often differ from club-season form alone.
ai_team_formation.decided_by: TWOS from the history and tournament-psychology requirement

ai_team_formation.responsibility: Challenge main picks and flag upset candidates.
ai_team_formation.why_needed: The mission explicitly asks for upset results and upset watch.

ai_team_formation.responsibility: Synthesize roles into final recommendations and daily sync.
ai_team_formation.why_needed: The project needs one final commander for output priority.
ai_team_formation.decided_by: TWOS from the multi-role decision mode

task_decomposition.Schedule Base: Build and maintain a 104-match Beijing-time schedule, group stage plus knockout structure, match-day windows, and next-day prediction scope.
task_decomposition.Team Intelligence: Team level, player form, injuries or rotation when supplied, tactics, formation, pressing, transition, set pieces, club-season load, and key-player condition.
task_decomposition.Odds / Market Layer: Mainstream bookmaker odds, 1X2, handicap, totals, score odds when available, market consensus, and suspicious pricing.
task_decomposition.Prediction Layer: Win/draw/loss, score, total goals, recommendation or main pick, upset watch, confidence, and priority.
task_decomposition.Daily Review Loop: Previous actual result vs predicted result, score hit/miss, total goals hit/miss, upset miss/hit, and calibration changes before next prediction.
task_decomposition.Multi-Role Decision: 赛果复盘员, 赔率盘口分析师, 战术风格分析师, 球员状态分析师, 历史与大赛心理分析师, 爆冷审计员, 总指挥.
task_decomposition.Output / Sync: Daily report, compact sync, feedback capture, and next-day prediction focus.

next_step.label: Next: Create Workspace / Project Matrix
next_step.principle: Generated from this need, not imposed as a fixed universal format.

project_matrix.title: 2026WC Project Matrix
project_matrix.source: Initial mission, real review loop, and 2026-06-30 sync.

mission_matrix.original_mission: Analyze schedule, team level, player form, style, tactics, history, upset factors, and mainstream odds to predict next Beijing-time match day only.
mission_matrix.schedule_base: 48 teams, 104 matches, 12 groups, group top two plus best third-place teams, then knockout path.
mission_matrix.review_rhythm: BJT/SGT 20:30 daily from 2026-06-10 to 2026-07-20, recorded as a review rhythm only.
mission_matrix.scope: Prediction and review use user-supplied context in this static prototype.

ai_decision_team.input_needed: actual score, prediction record, settled result
ai_decision_team.review_signal: direction, score, totals, and upset accuracy

ai_decision_team.input_needed: 1X2, handicap, totals, score odds, consensus notes
ai_decision_team.output_produced: market layer and suspicious pricing flags
tactical path and match state assumptions
ai_decision_team.review_signal: whether the expected match pattern appeared
whether player condition changed match quality

ai_decision_team.role: 历史与大赛心理分析师
ai_decision_team.input_needed: history, knockout pressure, rivalry, and big-match context
ai_decision_team.review_signal: overreaction or underreaction to big-match effects

ai_decision_team.input_needed: underdog path, odds tension, tactical mismatch
ai_decision_team.review_signal: upset hit/miss and missed warning signs

ai_decision_team.input_needed: all role outputs and user feedback
ai_decision_team.output_produced: final picks, priority, and compact sync
ai_decision_team.review_signal: final decision quality and rule drift

learning_loop.diagnosis: Possession without chance quality is overvalued.
learning_loop.next_workflow_impact: Require chance-quality check before favorite exposure.

learning_loop.diagnosis: Knockout advance risk differs from 90-minute strength.
learning_loop.next_workflow_impact: No correlated exposure across ML, advance, spread unless separately justified.

learning_loop.evidence: Morocco xG dominance and penalty win over Netherlands
learning_loop.diagnosis: Modern underdog can control chance quality despite lower brand heat.
learning_loop.next_workflow_impact: Raise Morocco/Brazil, remove Germany from champion path.

learning_loop.diagnosis: Five-back, low-block, cross-volume, and late-substitution paths matter in knockout games.

learning_loop.evidence: Excessive correlated Germany exposure drove linked losses.
learning_loop.diagnosis: One wrong thesis created multiple linked losses.
learning_loop.next_workflow_impact: Budget plans must separate independent edges from repeated same-view bets.

workflow_execution.title: 2026WC Workflow Execution
workflow_execution.subtitle: From Project Matrix to today's AI-team work queue

execution_source_stack.label: Schedule Base
execution_source_stack.contributes: 104 matches, Beijing / Singapore time, groups plus knockout path, prediction fields.
execution_source_stack.next_run_effect: Every active match must map back to a schedule row before drafting.

execution_source_stack.label: First Daily Output
execution_source_stack.contributes: June 12 matchday: Mexico 2-0 South Africa, Korea 1-1 Czech, opening-day cautious structure.
execution_source_stack.next_run_effect: Preserves the compact daily prediction style.

execution_source_stack.label: 73-Match Setup
execution_source_stack.contributes: First Round-of-32 budget plan, recorded screenshot prices, pending settlement mode.
execution_source_stack.next_run_effect: Carries budget intent and 90-minute vs advance separation into review.

execution_source_stack.label: 76-Match Settlement
execution_source_stack.contributes: Brazil/Japan, Germany/Paraguay, Netherlands/Morocco settlement, P/L, and rule updates.
execution_source_stack.next_run_effect: Updates favorite exposure, underdog, penalty, and correlation rules.

schedule_base_snapshot.coverage: 104 matches across group stage and knockout rounds
schedule_base_snapshot.groups: 12 groups from A to L, 48 teams total
schedule_base_snapshot.time_base: Beijing / Singapore match times already prepared
schedule_base_snapshot.source_provenance: FIFA official tournament page plus Sky Sports schedule

run_transition: 73 report: pending 100 RMB Polymarket budget using screenshot prices
Germany exposure error created correlation-risk rule update
Netherlands/Morocco 90-minute draw correct, advance call wrong
Next run applies rule changes to remaining 12 matches
review_checklist: Does every active match map to a schedule row?
Are Beijing/Singapore time and venue visible?
Are 90-minute, advance, spread, BTTS, cover, and correct score separated?
Are penalty and extra-time risks elevated?
Are scoreline predictions treated as low-confidence?
Is Budget P/L settled from recorded prices?
Is Implementation still No unless separately approved?
